forbidden_imports.description: AI layer must not import from Services (except types and i18n)

warnings.description: response-builder should not import OpportunityResult from learning

layer_constraints.description: ADR 001: Utils must not import from project

facade_checks.description: ADR 002: Services must use DB facade, not db/core directly
ADR 002: Services must not use getDb() directly
ADR 004: trip-execution must not import from lead.service

no_heuristic_ranking.description: geo.ts must not have heuristic CASE/WHEN in ORDER BY

no_hardcoded_priorities.description: geo.ts must not have hardcoded priority maps
